title: Automated Expiration of Blood Units
description: The system shall automatically mark blood units as expired after 42 days from their collection date and remove them from available inventory.
rationale: To ensure that only valid, non-expired blood units are available for distribution, reducing the risk of distributing expired or contaminated blood.
business_value: Improves patient safety by preventing the use of expired blood units, potentially saving lives and reducing healthcare risks.

source.description: As a inventory manager, I need the system to automatically mark blood units as expired after 42 days so that expired units are removed from available inventory and their status is updated accordingly.

acceptance_criteria: A blood unit with a collection date over 42 days ago is marked as expired.
The blood unit is removed from available inventory.
The unit's status is updated to 'expired'.
preconditions: The system has access to the collection date of the blood units.
The current date and time are accurately synchronized.
postconditions: Expired blood units are no longer available in the inventory pool.
The status of expired blood units is updated to 'expired'.
functional_constraints: Expiry check must be performed daily or as configured by an administrator.
The system must handle potential discrepancies between recorded collection dates and actual collection dates.
edge_cases: What happens if the system's date and time are not synchronized?
How does the system handle blood units collected on a weekend or holiday?
dependencies: A reliable data source for the collection dates of blood units.
A method to accurately track the current date and time.

interfaces.name: Inventory Database
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the inventory database to retrieve and update blood unit data.

test_cases.description: Check expiration of a blood unit collected exactly 42 days ago.
test_cases.expected_result: The blood unit is marked as expired and removed from the inventory pool.

test_cases.description: Check expiration of a blood unit collected 43 days ago.
test_cases.expected_result: The blood unit is marked as expired and removed from the inventory pool.

test_cases.description: Verify system handles date synchronization issues.
test_cases.expected_result: The system correctly identifies expired units even if the date and time are slightly off.
